title: Bus Drivers, School
description: Drive a school bus to transport students. Ensure adherence to safety rules. May assist students in boarding or exiting.

tasks.text: Comply with traffic regulations to operate vehicles in a safe and courteous manner.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Follow safety rules as students board and exit buses or cross streets near bus stops.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check the condition of a vehicle's tires, brakes, windshield wipers, lights, oil, fuel, water, and safety equipment to ensure that everything is in working order.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report any bus malfunctions or needed repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pick up and drop off students at regularly scheduled neighborhood locations, following strict time schedules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive gasoline, diesel, or electrically powered multi-passenger vehicles to transport students between neighborhoods, schools, and school activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain order among students during trips to ensure safety.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit reports that may include the number of students or trips, hours worked, mileage, or fuel consumption.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Report delays, accidents, or other traffic and transportation situations, using telephones or mobile two-way radios.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep bus interiors clean for students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read maps and follow written and verbal geographic directions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Regulate heating, lighting, and ventilation systems for student comfort.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report delinquent student behaviors to school administration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Escort small children across roads and highways.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
